base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of goomba_bob_omb — a character (npc) from 1990 super mario world. Goombas (Galoomba variant — roll-on-back not squash-flat) + Bob-omb. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Goombas (Galoomba variant — roll-on-back not squash-flat) + Bob-omb
